product_title: Bose Soundlink Flex 2nd Gen Wireless Bluetooth Portable Speaker, Waterproof, Fog Gray (887612-0800)
consensus_summary: The Bose SoundLink Flex 2nd Gen is a well-regarded portable Bluetooth speaker praised for its balanced sound quality, durability, and waterproof design. Users appreciate its rugged construction and reliable performance, though some find the premium price steep for the feature set. Battery life and connectivity are generally solid, making it popular for outdoor use.
pros: Excellent balanced sound quality with good bass and clarity
IP67 waterproof and dustproof rating, very durable
Compact and portable design with carrying handle
Strong Bluetooth connectivity range and stability
Premium build quality with textured exterior
Works well outdoors and in various environments
cons: Premium pricing compared to competitors with similar specs
Limited customization options via app controls
Bass-heavy tuning not ideal for all music genres
